calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Salciedo, #2031.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Dwight Wade, individually and dba N-FLYTE.
Default was entered against defendant on November 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 4, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dwight Wade, individually and dba N-FLYTE as follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,880.04.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,049.02.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $440.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $81,869.06.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph three of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Feb-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
